about.heading: About Us
paragraphs: Be the first to receive updates on exclusive events, secret menus, special offers/discounts, loyalty rewards & more!
Whether you’re looking for burritos, enchiladas or our amazing tacos, we’ve got you covered! Our Staff is here to make sure your experience is Amazing from the moment you step in our doors.
1112 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. BlvdMurfreesboro, Tennesse 37130(615) 624-8225

business.name: Patron Taqueria

To our guests with food sensitivities or allergies: We can not ensure that menu items do not contain ingredients that might cause an allergic reaction.

home.description: Authentic Mexican food in Murfreesboro, TN. Handcrafted margaritas, fajitas & enchiladas. 1112 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd, Murfreesboro, TN 37130. Order online today.
home.title: El Patron Taquerias | Murfreesboro, TN
